boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operations operator execute the industrial, utility, or safety-control action now? Focus: generator load transfer.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact control record closes the boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect in current source records.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current dispatch order and equipment status match.

critical_features_preserved: current dispatch order and equipment status match
final_answer: Source records close the exact generator load transfer boundary. The controlling control record confirms the required dependency is current and exact, including dispatch order and equipment status match. Communication and sensitivity notes do not override the control record, so the action may proceed.
